chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. S – 246 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.721/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 20.11.2025 None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The instant Constitutional Petition was presented on 16.0.2025; thereafter nobody has turned up to pursue the matter. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie indicates that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI/PS
